- Cols 44-47: orange (part of right U-shape's gap, connected to above)

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blue at rows 44-47, cols 28-47
# Move LEFT 2 to cols 20-39 (between U-shapes)
# Then try DOWN to reach U-shapes

# First check what's at rows 48-55, cols 18-42
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Rows 48-55, cols 18-42:")
for i in range(48, 56):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][18:42]}")

# Move LEFT 2 to cols 20-39
result = action(['LEFT', 'LEFT'])
print("\nAfter LEFT x2:")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"  Blue: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Now try DOWN
result = action(['DOWN'])
print("\nAfter DOWN:")
print("  No impact:", result.get('no_impact', False))
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"  Blue: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
